reviews.name: places/ChIJ3Semmry3D4gRe2jd_pONLX0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZLTZ5ZUVREAE
reviews.text:
I went to see David at Men's Performance Clinic to see if there was a solution to my Peyronies disease.
I found David to be very well informed, concerned, relatable and professional.
After just 1 treatment I feel there is a change and I am very hopeful of the overall treatment approach.
Since I am very educated around this disease I was very happy that this approach is non-invasive, safe, relies on my own bodies ability to heal and effective.
I can endorse Men's Performance Clinic - and feel confident of their approach in this sensitive and important part of life!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3Semmry3D4gRe2jd_pONLX0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDa0tPV0NnEAE
reviews.text:
I was always a hi energy athletic guy until I hit around 48 years old, then I started gaining weight, feeling sluggish, lazy, and worst of all my love drive was lowering!
I honestly was shy to call anyone, and didn't think they could do anything anyway!? So I waited years to seek any help.
Men's performance clinic did a thorough blood test on me and found out my testosterone levels were low. Now I am 54 years old and after seeing them for 3 months I have lost weight, have great energy levels again, plus most of all have an amazing love drive again!!!
These guys know what they are doing! I highly recommend them!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3Semmry3D4gRe2jd_pONLX0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZc05Dc2ZnEAE
reviews.text:
If you have Plantar Fasciitis, hands down the best treatment is acoustic wave therapy. I was in excruciating pain when walking!  It was really scary to think that this could last the rest of my life.
When I was looking for treatments, this one seemed like the best option because it works quickly.
Some other options were:
-taking pain medication (which seemed like putting a band aide on a broken leg)
-stretching
-physical therapy (which seemed like it could take a while may not work).
-surgery, which was the last thing I wanted to do!

The acoustic wave is fantastic! It worked quickly to relieve my pain and I feel great today!

If you are suffering from Plantar Fasciitis, I recommend that you give Men’s Performance Clinic a call and see how this treatment can help you.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3Semmry3D4gRe2jd_pONLX0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwbzZmWkxBEAE
reviews.text:
I HAD A GREAT EXPERIENCE WITH MEN'S PERFORMANCE CLINIC.
I NOTICED CHANGE WITH IN THE 1ST WEEK. BY THE 6TH TREATMENT, I NOTICED MORE IMPROVEMENTS. I WOULD RECOMMEND THE TREATMENTS FOR EVERY MAN. RESULTS MAY DIFFER FROM MAN TO MAN. GO IN GET A CONSULTATION, YOU HAVE NOTHING TO LOOSE, AND GAIN MORE CONFIDENCE.

reviews.name: places/ChIJOYm_EQqhD4gRSlF6wAERgMU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pFMFEydDZaRGhvZVdad2FqWlllVkJ5VDNsSFRGRRAB
reviews.text: What a great doctors visit. That’s kind of a funny thing to say but everyone there was beyond helpful and kind. I changed insurance and had to find a new GP. I didn’t know what to expect from them as I’ve been with my previous doctor for about 20 years. As I said, it was a flawless experience. I wasn’t rushed in any way and they listened to all my details even though I sometimes tend to run on and on. Katie and the entire team were great and the follow up was also fantastic. She took the time to explain each test result to me and made sure I truly understood. Great team!  Great job!  Thanks

reviews.name: places/ChIJOYm_EQqhD4gRSlF6wAERgMU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201NlJtUTBlVkZJY0Zaak9WTldYemRpVjNCV1JGRRAB
reviews.text: Men's Health Barrington is genuinely the best. The staff is incredibly attentive and makes you feel valued from the moment you walk in. Caring, thorough, and they always take the time to explain everything clearly. Every visit feels personalized, professional and comfortable. Overall, absolutely awesome and I can't recommend it enough. Also big shout out to the front desk staff for always being on their A game and putting the cherry on top for every visit.

reviews.text:
I love this place! I’m personally not too fond of doctors or the medical field in general, so when I heard about OptimizeU through Bryson at The Vitamin Shoppe I was intrigued to say the least.
Went and got my initial labs done with Ashlynd and Ryan then I got to schedule a sit down with Dr. Jessica Matis. All three of these individuals are very knowledgeable and kind. I’ve loved working with them and continue to do so! 100% recommend OptimizeU for anyone wanting labs done and a more natural approach compared to solving health issues with synthetic medication!

reviews.name: places/ChIJQbMxaRbRDIgRF68G4lyn6KY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0UFZYUTRaa1V4YWpGa2FXZGlTMmh6Y1d0MVgzYxAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about OptimizeU in Champaign. The level of care, professionalism, and attention to detail is outstanding. From the moment I walked in, the team made me feel comfortable, heard, and supported.

What surprised me most was how achievable better health actually felt once I had the right guidance and services in place. They take the time to explain everything, answer questions, and truly personalize their approach instead of offering a one-size-fits-all solution.

If you’re looking for a clinic that combines expertise with genuine service excellence, this is it. Highly recommend to anyone wanting to take real steps toward improving their health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJQbMxaRbRDIgRF68G4lyn6KY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4clJrOW5kSE5PY2w4elZXMHdlbk5ZTWs4d1gzYxAB
reviews.text: From the moment I walked in I knew I was going to love it! People are super friendly and welcoming. They want your experience to be positive in every way. For the first time I felt like a doctor actually cared about the big picture and the root cause of symptoms versus just treating one thing at a time. Can’t recommend this office enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJQbMxaRbRDIgRF68G4lyn6KY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKQ2RVeFJaa2xFVW1jMGJEZEVXREZxUVZaQ05GRRAB
reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about Optimize U! The staff is incredibly knowledgeable, professional, and genuinely cares about your health and wellness goals. From the moment I walked in, I felt welcomed and supported. They take the time to explain everything, answer all your questions, and make sure your plan is tailored just for you.

reviews.name: places/ChIJQbMxaRbRDIgRF68G4lyn6KY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CM05HZGtVVmR6VVhKeE1GbHZVVXBqVlhoV2FWRRAB
reviews.text:
I have been menopausal for a couple of years. With that comes lots of research, leading to antiquated information.
The professionals at Optimize U were and are wonderful! Unlike your standard “turn and burn” at medical centers, they all took their time to answer my questions, quell my anxiety, and shared their knowledge!
As if that wasn’t enough, I feel amazing. Back to being able to think, sleep, exercise, and socialize.
I look forward to being a client of yours for the foreseeable future.
For those of you that are waiting and wondering, make the appointment. You won’t regret it.
Thank you, Optimize U!

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ2NcpS7TD4gRyiaVxwcL0rM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21SWlZpMUpkbXgwUTBVMVJHeHZkelpRTWxkamQwRRAB
reviews.text:
As a guy in my dreaded 40s, I started experiencing the classic symptoms of fatigue and brain fog that everyone describes when dealing with low testosterone. I genuinely didn't think I would be low, as I work out and maintain a good diet. After doing more research, I decided to go with GameDay Health, and it has been a truly positive, seamless experience.

I met with the PA Jalpa, who was fantastic. My initial blood work came back alarmingly low (197), and she took the time to educate me thoroughly on what I needed to do.

Jalpa started me off with a very low dose of treatment and gradually increased it. She prioritized my comfort and safety by redrawing my blood every six weeks to meticulously check my levels and adjust the plan. This made me feel extremely comfortable and confident in the process.

The nurse, Mel, was super professional and efficient when administering shots and drawing blood. Every visit was painless and seamless.

I really appreciate the quick, short visits. For someone with a very busy schedule, this efficiency is a huge benefit.

I am feeling better, more energized, and the brain fog is gone. I couldn't recommend GameDay Health, Jalpa, and Mel more highly. They genuinely changed the game for my health and well-being.

reviews.text:
I got my husband a gift to go to Hero Men's Health. He was thoroughly impressed by the experience. From the moment he walked in, the friendly and professional staff made me feel at ease. The modern, clean facilities and personalized approach truly set this medspa apart. Every detail was taken care of, making it clear they genuinely care about men's wellness.

I highly recommend giving a man in your life the gift of Hero Men's Health for top-notch medspa services tailored specifically for men to boost their confidence.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLfdszH3TD4gRQFpIpnHkZ1I/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnNDVMUVNBEAE
reviews.text:
From the moment I stepped in, the personalized care and attention were evident. The team listened closely to my concerns, offered expert advice, and tailored a treatment plan that made me feel truly supported. Their focus on men’s health isn’t just a tagline—it’s a commitment to understanding and addressing our specific needs. The modern clinic, friendly atmosphere, and cutting-edge treatments have given me a renewed sense of confidence in my health.

If you’re like me and have been searching for a clinic that speaks directly to the challenges men encounter, look no further. Hero Men’s Health is, without a doubt, the perfect clinic for anyone who wants expert, compassionate care. Five stars all the way!

reviews.name: places/ChIJtaW86bssDogRx-9o-32GR60/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKeWVWUmxiekZsV2pOMlRDMHlORlZ1YzJ4MldtYxAB
reviews.text:
I had an appointment this morning at 9am for a yearly exam (not yet my PCP), was given 4GB of paperwork to fill out, I couldn’t get myself to concentrate on it, people been going in and out of the tiny waiting room every couple seconds with the cyclical door opening/closing noise tapping on my nerves.

On top of that, the reception lady looked so unfriendly and cold (smile! It’s free), I’m not even exaggerating, you’d think it’s a reception to some sacrificial ritual.
While I don’t know anything about the doctors, the check in experience at the reception was alone terrible enough for me to cancel on the spot.

I wouldn’t get in even if it was Dr. House inside.

reviews.name: places/ChIJoUqYiwTTD4gRwddRR5APv38/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKNlRXZDZlbmRaTlVoTlluRktRazVRVm5Wa1VYYxAB
reviews.text:
Lots of mixed reviews so I wanted to say I had a good first appointment experience today. PA Samantha Stuckey was very friendly, attentive, and knowledgeable. She was flexible with my needs and short/long term goals. I look forward to continuing to work with her!
Also the front desk staff and scheduling was easy and seamless for me. I left a voicemail initially and they called me back shortly after. I got in the following week

reviews.name: places/ChIJoUqYiwTTD4gRwddRR5APv38/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwSmMyTkpjV0p6T1U0eFVXd3haa1ZaWm10UFNYYxAB
reviews.text: Fabulous integrated health practice! The staff here are exceptional. Very friendly very attentive very professional. I'm on my third IV of vitamin C to eliminate mold from my body.  This practice was referred from my wife's biohacker in New York City.  We both have black mold in our bodies and ProHealth is really helping us eliminate this.

reviews.name: places/ChIJoUqYiwTTD4gRwddRR5APv38/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKR1VubE9aSFEyY1V4YVlUTlFUbmxLU1VFM1VVRRAB
reviews.text:
Follow up from my previous review of one star (below).  After I posted it, the practice manager called me and was very friendly and listened to my concerns about my experience.  She acknowledged a couple of things should have been done differently on their part and offered that I could get a follow-up session at no charge.  I appreciated that very much.  Again, I've heard good things about this practice in the past - my initial experience was just good.  Willing to give them the benefit of the doubt going forward.

I hate to write this review but I feel I have no choice.  I came here with high expectations of seeing a holistic doctor for a condition.  Unfortunately, my experience was not good.  First of all, I had to wait 45 min for the doctor to see me during the initial visit.  Even after I asked about an update, no one bothered to provide one.  I almost left.  When he did finally see me, I felt like I was being seen in the manner I wanted to be.  However, the doctor had me get blood work done but then didn't bother to review the results until I called multiple times and, even after that, barely provided any commentary on them or what may have been causing the condition I had come in for.  By that time, he probably didn't even remember.  As a result, after spending hundreds of dollars on multiple visits (you have to come in for a pre-screen before seeing the doctor), I still have no idea of what may be causing my condition.  Therefore, a complete waste of money and time.  I'm very, very disappointed and, obviously, would never go back here again.

reviews.name: places/ChIJoUqYiwTTD4gRwddRR5APv38/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSTlJYTmhTMVZDUWpobGQwbEZYMVY2UkcxNmExRRAB
reviews.text:
Have been on the holistic healing journey for about four years now. This was my second clinic I went to, and unfortunately realized it was very similar to my first one. Would not recommend, as they were supplement pushers and did not even try to treat my root cause at all. Didn’t even bother to run a dutch test, never checked up, and wanted to just do a
food allergy test and call it a day. For anyone who is well versed on holistic health, food allergies are not the root cause but rather a symptom that comes when have something deeper going on. If you are looking for a clinic that is worth the investment, has thorough providers that consistently check in on you, and is not just functional medicine clinic that will push supplements and hope for the best, this is not the place. Oh and not to mention, they charge your follow ups at a ridiculous price and it varies based on how long you’re on the call with your provider. Save your time money and health and look elsewhere.

reviews.name: places/ChIJoUqYiwTTD4gRwddRR5APv38/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21Sa1IxTlNXR2RpWjFWeE1XeHVORTFwUjFkUldXYxAB
reviews.text: The office communication here is abysmal and dramatically worse than it was 2 years ago. It is difficult to get ahold of any real person by calling the office. There is no communication ahead of appointments, no appointment reminders (via calls, texts, emails, or their own portal), no instructions from the office ahead of time on how to access a telehealth appt (I received a text message several minutes AFTER my scheduled appt time with a link). The only communication I received about my appointment was to make sure they had my payment info on file and then to make sure I had paid my bill. Super disappointing that this place has succumbed to our transactional, impersonal, and revenue-centered healthcare system too.

reviews.name: places/ChIJByUd0q63D4gRobnv-Wss2u8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWNFN6WnFiQzFFZEdoUWNHSnJYM0pHYVVsbWIxRRAB
reviews.text: I am thrilled to have found a place where men can feel comfortable, and get a different kind of natural therapy to help them maintain their “stallion” status in bed. I’m in my 50’s and nurse Abby is a top tier registered nurse that helped educate me on new treatments and prevention methods. I’ve tried other male clinics…and this DesPlaines/Park Ridge staff made me feel super comfortable and at ease.

reviews.name: places/ChIJByUd0q63D4gRobnv-Wss2u8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205b05UVmxMWEJaV0UxME1WUXlaMGxGWDFSa2MwRRAB
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Game Day Men’s Health – Park Ridge

My experience at Game Day Men’s Health was top-tier from the moment I walked in. The entire team is professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely welcoming—it honestly felt like a place you’d want to come back to, not just for care but for the people.

Abby at the front desk was awesome—super knowledgeable and broke down the ins and outs of the place with ease. She made everything simple to understand and set the tone right away. Great smile & easy to be around!

Dell is a great nurse. Blood work and the shot were quick, smooth, and painless—couldn’t have asked for an easier experience. Loads of experience!

Missy is a phenomenal NP. She has a deep level of knowledge and, more importantly, a great ear. She really listened, understood my goals, and helped put together a solid game plan that made sense for me. I look forward to working with her!

And Jason, the owner, is just cool—down-to-earth and approachable. The kind of guy you’d figure to be running a place like this.

Overall, the vibe, the professionalism, and the care were all on point. I’d honestly go back just to hang out & they have the best refreshments! If you’re looking for a place that treats you like a human and not a number, this is it. Highly recommend. 💪🏼🔥

reviews.name: places/ChIJByUd0q63D4gRobnv-Wss2u8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tzM00wZEdOM0ZhZDNVNU5tZDZXR3RpZDFCNU0xRRAB
reviews.text: If you are nervous or confused about finding a place that can actually help you. Well look no farther..Game day is for you. No attitudes at this place. Kyle greets you..great guy.  Missy was my clinical director. Very sweet and understood me. Finally Abby was amazing. She went through everything you need to know. Very easy to talk to with no judgment. I just started and I'm looking forward to dealing with this crew of people that really want to help.

reviews.name: places/ChIJByUd0q63D4gRobnv-Wss2u8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwd1pXZDROMUJ0V2pBNFV6aHFZVWhUVnpsMlZFRRAB
reviews.text:
I recently visited Gameday Men's Health, and I was genuinely impressed. The service was outstanding - truly top-level. Everything was explained in a clear, scientific way, and you can immediately tell that the team there consists of real professionals who know exactly what they're talking about.

They made me feel comfortable, answered all my questions, and provided a very organized, efficient experience. Overall, it was a great visit, and I'm very satisfied with the quality of care I received.

reviews.name: places/ChIJByUd0q63D4gRobnv-Wss2u8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaYU0weHZRWE5yYzFoQ1NVbE9ZMmgwTldsdlVuYxAB
reviews.text:
When i started looking for a consult a couple places never bothered to even return a call. Called Gameday and boom Kyle answers the phone. Takes the time to explain the consult process and all that. Upon coming in all i can say Abby and Missy are awesome. Even after a month if they had a bad day you would never know. As many others have stated, these folks actually communicate with you, are there for you, and give the time. I needed to change my appt last min and the owner reached out on a Sunday when they are closed to make sure i was able to get in on a short holiday week.
If you looking for some help, it doesnt hurt to chat with them.

reviews.text:
I highly recommend Ageless Men’s Health to any man who wants to be the best version of himself and maintain top-notch health. From the moment you walk in, the team makes you feel comfortable, respected, and genuinely cared for.

Corrinne is absolutely amazing to work with. She’s knowledgeable, professional, and truly takes the time to listen and understand your goals. She explains everything clearly and makes the whole process easy and encouraging.

If you’re a guy looking to improve your energy, optimize your health, and take control of your well-being, Ageless Men’s Health is the place to go. I’m grateful for the experience and would recommend them to any gentleman serious about investing in his health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJzSI-FxFSDogR_cjjBsecZ3M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psSlpHOUlUMUJWVGxGaGQwSktkV3BzTFU5dlFsRRAB
reviews.text:
Where do I even begin. I have had such an incredible experience with Ageless Men’s Health, both from the results and also my experience with everyone involved.

Starting with Jon at the counter who is so incredibly kind and friendly. You walk in and are immediately greeted with a warm hello and what feels like a hug. His energy is so infectious and he makes you feel right at home.

I have been working with Corrinne consistently since I have been going to Ageless Men’s Health. From the first time I met her, there was an instant connection. She is professional, thorough, and incredibly caring. From our initial interaction, I was immediately put at ease. Corrinne walked me through all of my options and explained exactly how the process was going to go. From week to week, Corrinne does a lovely job of checking in to see how I’m doing on every level. She is genuinely concerned about me and my health and I feel incredibly cared for.

If there are times when Corinne is not in the office, everyone else there does an amazing job!! I would absolutely recommend Ageless Men’s Health to anyone who is looking for services. I am so grateful that I have such an incredible place to refer to where I know people will be taken care of. Thanks for being awesome everyone!

reviews.name: places/ChIJzSI-FxFSDogR_cjjBsecZ3M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CblYyZEdRVTFRY0RNM2VIWXhlazQxVVVWTlNHYxAB
reviews.text: Great experience with Corrine.  She’s made everything fast, convenient and flexible!  Pays attention to detail, hears my specific health goals and has worked collaboratively to help me get there.  So much better than other health companies and with a great personal touch.  Big thanks!

reviews.name: places/ChIJzSI-FxFSDogR_cjjBsecZ3M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s5M1RFNXVaRTFNTFhWSWFWaFRlREpPWW5VNFExRRAB
reviews.text:
Corrinne is the best!! This was my first time getting Botox and she made the entire experience so easy and comfortable. She explained everything thoroughly and I felt completely informed before my injections. She is so light-handed with the needle that I barely felt a thing. She placed the Botox in areas I didn’t even realize I needed and it truly transformed my look. My face looked smoother, slimmer, and had that amazing Botox glow.

She also told me about the other services she offers and I was so impressed by how knowledgeable she is about everything. She instantly puts you at ease. I am already SO excited for my next appointment. Thank you, Corrinne!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJzSI-FxFSDogR_cjjBsecZ3M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1R1ZVTjJObHB4WlV4SU5HcHlNaTFUZUdsME5rRRAB

reviews.text: Keri is the best.  She is compassionate and understanding.  Keri has a passion for her work and will always go above and beyond to investigate symptoms and test results to determine the root cause of your issues.  She will give advice and guidance and continually work with you to help you improve.  She listens and she explains results.  Keri has given a new very positive perspective of functional medicine which we knew very little about. When we ran out of places to turn in traditional medicine, Keri was there and continues to help anytime we reach out to her.  Highly recommended!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJfwVv7XnHD4gRWBoV_pDUCeM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paUmNsZEhlRVJoY3pBM2RWRldVSEY0YTFwNmIyYxAB
reviews.text:
I came to Revive Integrative Health after experiencing severe joint pain for several months that was unexplained by any of the physicians I was seeing.  I went from being an active long-distance runner and weight lifter to barely being able to get out of bed in the morning.  I could not sit for long periods of time without pain and I was up all night in pain.  I was told that my labs were all normal so there is likely nothing wrong with me.  It was recommended by my group of doctors that I should take more Aleve, and consider adding a biologic such as Humira - though without much confidence this would help and putting me at risk for loads of side effects.  It was also recommended that I schedule surgeries on several of my joints.

At that time, I was referred to Dr. Confer by a friend - but was honestly skeptical that much could help.  However, out of desperation, I was willing to try anything.  As a nurse practitioner specializing in cancer care for the last 20 years, I was not sure that supplements, diet, and alternative therapies would be my answer.  However, from my very first call to the lovely receptionist, I felt welcome and understood.  From there, my first visit with Dr. Confer was eye opening.  Despite my nursing background, Dr. Confer approached my labs in a way that I had never fully understood.  No other physicians had educated me on what is "normal" vs what is functional.  Dr. Confer leans into educating patients and wants to ensure I understand the path I am on.  She remembers small details that I mention from visit to visit, and truly cares to make me whole again.  Her dietician Sam has also been such a gift to me, and completely helped me to overhaul my diet.  She took such a personalized approach to my special needs without judgement.  She made changes that fit into my life and made my diet manageable.

At our first visit, Dr. Confer thought that after 6 weeks I would feel better.  After just 4 weeks, I can confidently say that I am almost back to the person I was before my symptoms began.  I am running again with joy (without joint pain!) and looking forward to my life again.  I am forever grateful for finding this practice and would recommend without reservation.

reviews.name: places/ChIJfwVv7XnHD4gRWBoV_pDUCeM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wT04wRXlUMkYzTUVKUE1uVkpiMlpCUkRCUU0zYxAB
reviews.text:
After years and years of feeling unheard by other doctors, working with Dr. Confer truly changed my life. She actually listened, got to the root cause of what was going on, and addressed my issues in a really thoughtful, methodical way instead of just treating symptoms. I never felt rushed or dismissed. She was in regular contact, answered all of my questions, and supported me the entire way through the process.

Sam, the nutritionist, was also amazing. She helped me through some big dietary changes and made sure I was still eating food that tasted good, which made everything feel realistic and sustainable.

10/10 recommend Revive. It’s helped me tremendously and I’ve seen the impact it’s had on family and friends too. So grateful I found this team!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJfwVv7XnHD4gRWBoV_pDUCeM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0YVRXSkxSSGRvYldKeVpGRkVNMDVOU0ZwTVJrRRAB
reviews.text:
I’m now two months into my process with Revive, and I can honestly say that you don’t realize how bad you felt until you finally feel really really good. It’s only been 8 weeks and even so, looking back, I have no idea how I managed before.

With Dr. Confer and Samantha, I’ve never felt more supported, more educated, or more confident that someone truly has a vested interest in making the next decades of my life the healthiest I’ve ever lived.

When it comes to cost, it’s negligible compared to the value. Some parts of my care may be covered by insurance, and I was able to use my FSA for the rest. In the end, it costs about the same as a typical general medical visit plus any nutraceuticals tailored to my plan, but the level of care, access for questions, and attention, is on another level.

Dr. Confer and Samantha use a practical, easy-to-understand approach that makes change feel achievable. They:

Take time to explain, clearly and patiently, how everything in the body works together. Not just once but over and over to reinforce the “why” I feel what I do and the solutions moving forward.

Run comprehensive testing to get real data. Enormously helpful that these tests are done at a  lab where all prices are discounted as a patient of Revive.
Use that data to create a deeply curated, highly focused, and carefully monitored plan watching and monitoring all aspects with near real time access to them as needed with no hassle. I’m stunned by that fact alone.

The weekly appointments are the key to my success and can be easily switched to video virtual as needed with literally no guilt or judgment.

Total transparency, it took me about 9 days to find my rhythm but Samantha was amazing in getting me really rolling and now the process from the moment that I wake to the moment I go to bed feels natural and not forced. Driven by the way I feel and the desire to maintain it. Supported the whole way.

So, I’m ready for the next phase and genuinely excited to continue working with these incredible co-stewards of my health.  I can say that they’ve already dramatically improved the quality of my life and have educated me on how to sustain this way.

It’s only been two months and even so, they’ve earned my respect, total cooperation, trust, and my sincere gratitude. The gratitude I feel is what compelled me to post this note as a review instead of just sending them a letter.

Thank you so much and I’ll see you next week!

I highly recommend Dr. Confer and Revive Integrative Health!

reviews.text: Dr. Tack will work with you to optimize your health and wellness. It should be mandatory for all PCP's to conduct hormone panels at every annual physical when a patients is 35 or over. Suffering because of low hormone levels is not necessary, and Dr. Tack will get you feeling 20 years younger. Quicker than you might think.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ22xqgwWSD4gRNfgedQNccKY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnbEtpTGRBEAE
reviews.text:
This was the most bizarre doctor’s visit that I ever had.
It was uncomfortably entertaining….
I honestly thought it was a hidden camera show and I was waiting for cast of practical jokers to appear.
I’m going to pay my bill just because It was awesomely awkward.
I don’t typically write reviews but I would suggest potential patients to look elsewhere for medical advice.
However, it would make a fun date night with guaranteed high jinks and hilarious mishaps.

5 stars for the entertainment but 0 stars for medical experience.
I will be back!

reviews.text:
I had good experience in the past with Groupon that’s why I went back for IV therapy !
The staff is nice they try but the doctor himself has some attitude problems ! He acts like a big boss orders around his employees 0 engagement with his patients !! Twice I showed up to my appointment only to be told that I’m not in the schedule !!!   No apology nothing !!! I’m standing right in front “the Doctor” and he communicates with me trough his front desk person like I was not worth speaking to because I came with iv groupon ! He told the front desk lady to tell me Groupon is no longer accepted Mrs . Doctor I’m right  here I don’t need interpreter !!!!The culmination was when  he had mercy on my Groupon and said it will accepted but…. They cloudnt find a vain he  kept rushing the nurse , he walked in the room without knocking he just stormed in I had my shirt off because it was hard to roll my sleeve .he was yelling at her why she she didn’t labeled something … I felt violated , how he can just walk in like that like I’m not a person worth respect  , my vain was damaged I had to leave without getting any service and I paid for it !!! Now I’m fighting with Groupon to get my money back and defiantly won’t come back there just Because of his big ego and entitled attitude !!! Rest of the staff was amazing as always !

reviews.text: I’ve never felt that they care about my health at all. I’ve expressed concerned at every visit for two years and they just keep saying, diet and exercise. Even though I’ve clearly been diagnosed with 2 different conditions. My last straw is when I had an appointment at 8:30. I was the only person there and waited a half hour. I finally came out of the room and asked what was going on and I was informed that the doctor wasn’t even there yet. It was 30 minutes past my appointment. When she did finally get there, she acted like she was annoyed with me being there waiting for her. And then I was out of the office in less than 10 minutes, again acting as if she didn’t really care about my concerns. I will be looking for another doctor.

reviews.text: While all the rest of the staff at the clinic were wonderful to deal with, Dr. El Harake himself unfortunately wound up being completely unhelpful to me. reviews.name: places/ChIJHW5uQ2eXD4gRSQPq6wfTYXI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wMmNrcDFOVm95WVhOaFVuZE5hMW94TlRnNFpXYxAB
reviews.text: When I first came into Game Day Men’s Health in Libertyville, it felt really welcoming. Everyone was super friendly and professional. They took the time to answer all my questions and explained everything in a clear and informative way. I felt comfortable the entire time and appreciated how knowledgeable the staff was. Definitely recommend checking them out if you’re considering it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJHW5uQ2eXD4gRSQPq6wfTYXI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGRVl6QTBNVkZOTXpKek5WaDFkMlpMUjI1dkxYYxAB
reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ The Gold Standard for Patient Care!

I recently visited Gameday Men's Health in Libertyville as a new patient, and I am honestly blown away by the experience. I’ll admit I was a little overwhelmed starting this journey, but the team here is world class.

Dr. Binda is fantastic. He didn’t just talk at me; he talked with me. He took the time to listen to my concerns and explained the science and the process in a way that actually made sense. I left his office feeling confident and informed.

A massive shoutout to Dan and Dhruvi as well. I probably asked the same questions three different ways, but their patience never wavered. They are incredibly kind, welcoming, and went above and beyond to make sure I felt like a priority.

You can tell the staff here truly cares about their patients. It’s a warm, professional environment where you don't feel like just another appointment on the calendar. If you’re looking for a team that is patient, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in your health, go see Dr. Binda, Dan, and Dhruvi. You won’t regret it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJjRuBmPFNDogR7HAJ41itk9A/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2poU1YzWjBUbnBDTFZKelQwaDVVbE0zVUVkVVRHYxAB
reviews.text: Do not recommend. With each phone call to the office or doctor I was reminder that Dr. Rashid is a very BUSY woman who has a practice in another state. I never felt like I was a priority, I felt like a nuisance. I one point I was instructed to NOT contact her directly and rather just communicate via a non HIPAA compliant email. Hormonal therapy is complicated and often requires patience, compassion and understanding on the part of the provider. I was met with that once or twice but that tapered off as the medicine she provided was not working. Generally, I felt forgotten and unimportant. Each appointment was via phone ONLY, where you could hear Dr. Rashid rushing from one place to another, in her car, etc. Today it's hard to believe someone wouldn't use telemedicine or video for getting to know their patients. Even seeing their patient, their disposition, etc is extremely important in treating them. I sincerely regret the amount of time and $ I spent at this office.

reviews.text: True Test is professional, efficient, and well organized. The staff is knowledgeable, communication is clear, and the process is smooth from start to finish. I would confidently recommend their services.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9afvDpc7d4gRnluoAlBx_ik/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pZeGVWaGlhV2xUTUc4dE0yVTBaakJaWjNWaU5tYxAB
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of visiting True Test in Marion, IL, and I can’t say enough good things about my experience! From the moment I walked in, I was greeted with a warm smile and a friendly atmosphere that instantly put me at ease.

The staff at True Test truly shine when it comes to customer service. They went above and beyond to make sure I felt comfortable and informed throughout my visit. It's clear that they genuinely care about their patients. I had a million questions (and I mean a million!), but rather than feeling rushed or dismissed, they took the time to answer each one patiently and thoroughly. Their willingness to engage and help was incredibly refreshing!

The environment itself is welcoming and positive, making it a place where you feel valued and cared for. It’s not just about the services they provide; it’s about the kindness and support that permeates the entire facility.

If you’re looking for a place where you can feel secure and well taken care of, I highly recommend True Test in Marion. They’ve mastered the art of customer service while maintaining a friendly, approachable vibe. Kudos to the entire team for creating such a wonderful experience!

---

Feel free to adjust any part of it to match your personal style!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9afvDpc7d4gRnluoAlBx_ik/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKVWRXbzBlbGhEYmpVdE1qRlJlVlZNVmxSeGIyYxAB
reviews.text: I can’t say enough wonderful things about True Test and how great they have been and helped me as I navigate going through this next phase of the aging process. They listen, they work with you to optimize the best possible outcome for you to feel your best. I’ve never felt better, slept better and have more energy than I do now at age 51. If you are on the fence, I encourage you to make the appointment and talk to them. You won’t be disappointed!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9afvDpc7d4gRnluoAlBx_ik/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toSVNraHhRMUJCVFRWNVgzWlRTazFTTTJkcWFFRRAB
reviews.text: True Test HRT are amazing. The staff are absolutely wonderful and informative. I was traveling for work and needed to see someone asap. They got me in right away and in less than a week I was given my lab results, a month supply and my next appointment. They sit you down and don't sugar coat anything. Upfront and to the point on everything to include their prices. I will definitely being going back.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9afvDpc7d4gRnluoAlBx_ik/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twNGJsVmxOSG81VXpCM01XSjFNbWRPWVZKQ1NuYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve got everything great to say! From the beginning I met Jordan talking about benefits of treatment in the neighboring Stack’d Suppliments. I inquired and he was kind enough to take my name and number to have someone at True Test follow up with me to schedule a consult. They were very informative and transparent with the process and information. I’ve been with them for almost a year and a half now and the results have been nothing less than amazing. I was suffering from lack of energy, deteriorating focus, and was easily irritable. This has all resolved and I can now enjoy time with my children after work, help maintain a household (or at least pull my own weight), and my mood has been consistent and normalized. They continue to listen to my needs, keep me regulated with regular blood tests, and always maintain kindness and professionalism. An outstanding company and team! And the new Marion location is absolutely fantastic!

I had a great experience at Game Day Men’s Health, and I want to specifically recognize Amy, Christie, and Rosy. They took the time to answer all my questions, explained everything clearly, and made the entire process comfortable and straightforward.

What really stood out was how personable and knowledgeable they are. You can tell they truly care about their patients and take pride in what they do. The atmosphere was positive, efficient, and respectful of my time.

If you’re considering Game Day Men’s Health, I highly recommend working with Amy, Christie, and Rosy. They make the experience easy and stress-free.

reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about GD Naperville. TRT has truly been life-changing for me. Before starting, I was constantly tired, lacked motivation, and just didn’t feel like myself. Since beginning treatment, my energy, focus, and overall well-being have completely turned around. I honestly feel like my younger self again.
The staff is knowledgeable, professional, and genuinely cares about helping you feel your best. They take the time to explain everything and make the whole process easy and comfortable. If you’ve been considering TRT, I highly recommend coming here. It’s one of the best decisions I’ve made in a long time.

reviews.text: My husband started about three months ago, and I wanted to take a moment to share how great his experience has been. The results have been amazing so far. He’s feeling better, has more energy, and is truly thriving. We’re both very happy with the progress he’s made, and I really appreciate the positive impact this has had on his health and overall well-being. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ5UVYbdT5DogRHWRp_GyjMmY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pod1lXdzJXbGhSWTNGc1lYUlZNVjloUkdOcWVVRRAB
reviews.text: Rosy at GameDay Men's Health was absolutely wonderful. She was professional, kind, and made the entire experience comfortable from start to finish. She took the time to answer questions, explain everything clearly, and made my husband feel genuinely cared for as a patient. It’s not always easy walking into a medical office, but Rosy’s friendly attitude and attention to detail made a big difference. I truly appreciate her great service and would highly recommend this office because of staff members like her.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ5UVYbdT5DogRHWRp_GyjMmY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pORk9HTkhNemRVTkZkVGVGVTFaRFpDWlRZMWMyYxAB
reviews.text: So I have been a patient of game day in Naperville for about six weeks now, and I must say that I feel like a new man! It was really hard accepting the fact that my body was changing negatively and I had severe anxiety about possibly seeing if these things were true that I was researching. I had low energy. I had low sex drive. I was always tired and I was always in a bad mood. It seemed like. I came in for a consultation with nurse Jess and nurse Amy and I honestly felt like they weren’t looking down at me due to the answers that I was giving on my questionnaire. I just knew something was wrong and I didn’t know what it was. It’s been about six weeks now and going in once a week for a very fast 15 minute or less appointment is so unbelievably convenient. I have had my blood work done twice so I know that they are following the rules when it comes to monitoring your body. My muscles have continuously stayed hard throughout the day and weak, and I’m waking up every morning with rockhard Morningwood. I know it might sound like TMI, but this for men. I feel the best I felt in a long time! Most of all I really enjoy coming in because I feel like the nurses are becoming my friends. They are very personable and nurse. Amy is always smiling and being personable asking me about my week and so forth. The other nurses are also very nice and very friendly and I really enjoy coming in here in the morning because it sets my day up for positive vibes! I will forever be a customer here because of how they make me feel physically and emotionally. I can’t wait to start my peptide treatment soon. Thank you, nurse Amy, and your team you are literally changing my life! -Bartender Dave. 😘

reviews.name: places/ChIJ-WlmD1ZWDogR6oEh8O9Zl1w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xBek5qVjJRWGN4UVhwZlFtUk1aelp4TmtVdFVtYxAB
reviews.text:
After a frustrating runaround with another clinic that canceled my first appointment and pushed me months back, I called Men’s Healthcare Chicago in Naperville and everything changed. From the very first phone call the team was exceptional — the woman who answered was unbelievably patient, kind, and knowledgeable. She calmly walked me through every question, stayed on the line while I sent paperwork, and even helped me correct an error without a hint of impatience. That level of service set the tone for the entire experience.

They got me in for my first blood draw the very next day and scheduled the follow-up test within the week. Every step was handled quickly and professionally. At my first treatment the staff member who explained the process went into such clear, thoughtful detail that I had zero unanswered questions by the time she finished. Appointments have been prompt, the clinic is clean and organized, and every person I’ve interacted with has been friendly, courteous, and genuinely caring.

I completed multiple visits before writing this review because I wanted to be sure — and I can say without hesitation that this clinic truly prioritizes patients. Their communication, responsiveness, and attention to detail are next level. If you want a clinic that moves fast, treats you like a person, and delivers consistently excellent service, Men’s Healthcare Chicago Naperville is the place to go. I am beyond impressed and recommend them wholeheartedly to anyone seeking TRT care — five stars is not enough.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ-WlmD1ZWDogR6oEh8O9Zl1w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsR00xUkVjSE14TVdFNWNWUXhiekpuTUhkWFUxRRAB
reviews.text:
I've been going to Men's Health Chicago in Naperville for a few years now and I can honestly say that everyone there is top notch. From the girls at the front desk, to the medical assistants, up to the providers. Every week I look forward to going in there because it's almost guaranteed I'll see Amanda as my provider. In a word she's awesome. She's really laid back and likes to joke around. More importantly, she's willing to listen, and is open to discussion about your medical concerns and treatment which is paramount. I also look forward to seeing Maria every week.  She's one of the medical assistant that helps out the providers. She's been my go to, every week, for the last few years. I'm honestly not sure how she's not sick of me yet... She's very professional and extremely knowledgeable. She legitimately cares about my health and wants the best for her patients. As a person who works in emergency medicine, I can say this is highly commendable! If by chance that Maria is off a day, I look forward to seeing Lyndsey. She's newer to the team but she trained with the best (Maria)... How do I know? Because I was there for my weekly shot and Lydnsey was shadowing her. Lydnsey is great to see as well! She's a ray of sunshine and is very personable. She has the right attitude and drive, and I can tell she's going to do great in this field!
In summary 15 out of 10 would recommend!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ-WlmD1ZWDogR6oEh8O9Zl1w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkNlFVeFBia1JaV2tzd0xYQlJjbEJqZFVkeU1XYxAB
reviews.text: After making a phone call to the clinic Alejandra answered the phone. I had serious questions pertaining to additional medication’s such as hCG and nobody knew the answers to those questions. This tells me that the staff here is completely clueless as to what the treatment program looks like. I am not gonna waste my time and fast and get all kinds of blood work done if people cannot answer simple questions over the phone. Why do they tell me just to come in and ask the person during my consultation? Is this a way to just hush me up just to come in to be disappointed? I really wish there was a little bit more “attention to detail” when callers ask you serious questions. I’ve been on similar TRT programs before and never had to get 2 blood tests done before treatment. What is the reason for that? Alejandra says “for insurance reasons “ clearly she doesn’t know how insurance works. That makes no sense.  I’m not gonna settle for word salads …….Per my conversation with Alejandra I have zero faith in this clinic’s ability to satisfy my TRT needs- and how does somebody not know what bio identical hormones are? What a joke.

reviews.text:
Highly Recommend!
This clinic is a breath of fresh air. The facility itself is sleek and modern, but it’s the team that really makes the place shine.
Max, Laura, and Giovanna are absolute pros—they’ve mastered the balance of providing top-tier clinical care while still making you feel like a valued customer. From my very first appointment, I’ve been nothing but impressed by their expertise and professionalism.
What really sets them apart is their communication. They actually take the time to sit down and walk you through every detail of your treatment plan, making sure you’re fully comfortable and informed before moving forward. That level of dedication is rare.
If you’re looking for a knowledgeable, patient-focused team, this is the place to go!

reviews.text:
– Gameday Is Definitely for Women Too

I honestly thought Gameday was just for men… and I couldn’t have been more wrong. As a woman, I felt completely comfortable and welcomed from start to finish — and that’s 100% because of Joanna.

Joanna is absolutely amazing. She’s knowledgeable, compassionate, and incredibly thorough, and she explains everything in simple terms. She took the time to answer all my questions and made sure I felt confident and informed every step of the way.

What really stood out was how many women I saw coming in and specifically asking for Joanna — and now I totally understand why. She’s professional, warm, and genuinely cares about her patients. There was zero pressure and zero judgment, just support and expertise.

If you’re a woman who’s on the fence or thinks Gameday isn’t for you, trust me — it is. And if you can, see Joanna. She’s the reason I’d come back and recommend Gameday Oak Brook to anyone!

reviews.text: I just completed my first year and a half with the team at VMH in O’Fallon, IL and I couldn’t be happier. The staff and doctors they have there are knowledgeable, considerate, and patient driven. I’d like to especially thank Dr. Cara for helping me regain the control and confidence I had when I was much younger. I look forward to seeing how the next year and a half goes!

reviews.name: places/ChIJQfQsz1MBdogReJwMzo9lje8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5RWRISnZjbkJTYVZaWVV6aENaMlpVWTFFeWNWRRAB
reviews.text:
I've been a patient at Victory Men's Health for three years, and I can't say enough good things about them. This place has genuinely changed my life for the better.

From the moment you walk in, the entire staff is incredibly friendly, professional, and genuinely cares about your well-being. They aren't just trying to push services; they listen, run detailed blood tests, and create a plan that is 100% customized for you. The office is clean, efficient, and the entire experience is top-notch.

I originally came in for testosterone therapy, which has been fantastic. But the comprehensive approach is what really makes the difference. Based on my blood work, they got me on a custom-tailored supplement plan. I've also used their IV therapy for recovery and energy support, which has been a game-changer after tough workouts.

I'm 46, but I honestly feel like I'm in my 20s again. Over the last three years, I've lost stubborn weight I couldn't get rid of, gained significant lean muscle, and my energy levels are through the roof. It's not just about the numbers; it's about feeling optimized and healthy every single day.

Their pricing is very reasonable for the level of custom care and personal attention you receive. I am incredibly happy with my results and the service. If you're a guy my age and feel like you've lost a step, do yourself a favor and go see the team at Victory. I highly, highly recommend them!

reviews.text:
Adam had an absolutely astounding number of great reviews on ZocDoc - and its no wonder why.  He is by far the best medical provider I have ever seen.  He is thorough, discovered issues that other providers missed, called me back same day, is patient to listen to all my concerns, answer a million of my questions, and I don't feel like just a number. He treats me like a person and a partner in my health journey.
He doesn't dismiss my comments, questions, or suggestions like many medical providers have.  Since meeting with him, in 3 months time I've lost 30 lbs, eliminated one of my medications I've been on for more than 20 years, and have more energy and feel better than I have in decades.

reviews.name: places/ChIJZdSDyNg_DogRso3_OvOLtVU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNMbUppYzVRRRAB
reviews.text: I started seeing Adam recently for some long term issues I've had for years. In the short amount of time that Adam has been treating me he's done more for me/my health than any other doctor has done in the past 20 years for me, and that's no exaggeration. I've tried numerous times over the past 20 years to tackle these issues and have seen MANY other doctors in that time and have tried everything from Zoloft, effexor, Seroquel, risperdone, Clonazepam, alprazolam, and many more and not one of those have seemed to helped me at all and in fact made me feel terrible most of the time so I pretty much gave up on getting proper help. The doctors I've seen in the past either couldn't properly treat me or just wouldn't bother so it was extremely frustrating and I suffered longer because of it. I decided recently to try and see a doctor one last time to address these problems hopefully(they were progressively getting worse) and I ended up at LIT and Adam put me on a medication I haven't been on since I was a kid and put together a treatment plan that has literally been life changing for me so far! I can focus/concentrate again, I'm actually finishing tasks and not skipping around mid-task to another task, I'm eating better and more, my sleep patterns are the best they've been in years, my anxiety has basically gone away which was a pleasant Surprise and I have motivation again.  Adam also figured out my testosterone levels are very low so I started TRT with him too so I'm hoping that will also help to make me feel even better! I feel like I'm getting back to my old self again and feel like I'm FINALLY regaining back control of my health and mental health! Even my wife, my kids and my friends have all mentioned to me how much better I seem this past month since Adam put me back on my old medication. Adam's bedside manner is fantastic, he genuinely cares about his patients, answers all your questions, is super knowledgeable, I never feel judged with him, and i would recommend him to anyone! I'm very grateful for Adam and everything he has done so far for me!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJZdSDyNg_DogRso3_OvOLtVU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwMjcybndnRRAB
reviews.text:
I've been to several doctors and I stopped going to them and even looking for one for many years because they were repeatedly unable to help me. I don't have health insurance and it was just a waste of money to keep trying. Adam is different.

This man is an encyclopedia of knowledge with a wealth of experience and is extremely helpful with whatever you throw at him.

He tries his best to serve the patient's needs and to save their dollar and you don't get that kind of care everywhere. I continue seeing Adam as he is an honest provider in a world where people will have you running in circles to line their pockets. Every medical issue I have had he has been able to help me with and even educated me that some things weren't what I had thought.

If you're on the fence about seeing Adam, I drive an hour to do so. It's worth the drive to have a provider with vast knowledge, experience, and your best interests at heart. I highly recommend him.

reviews.text:
The consultation was thorough and never rushed. Patty took the time to explain how tirzepatide works, what to realistically expect, and how it fits into my overall health goals. I never felt pressured—only supported. The HRT process was equally impressive: personalized, well-monitored, and focused on optimizing how I feel long-term, not just quick fixes.

What I appreciate most is Patty’s emphasis on safety, lab work, and ongoing follow-up. This isn’t a “one-size-fits-all” spa—it’s a true wellness practice with knowledgeable staff who stay current and actually listen. I feel more energized, balanced, and confident in my health decisions since starting treatment here.

If you’re looking for a professional, reputable med spa for tirzepatide and hormone replacement therapy, this is absolutely the place.

reviews.name: places/ChIJCSLdt2GlD4gRAAj9rBwiCLI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMXV1M1ZREAE
reviews.text: First of all, I am not a paid writer for Dr. Mazzei. I've been his patient for the last 5 years. In 2012 at age 43, I already had the classic symptoms of andropause- irritability, fatigue, low sex drive, and hot flashes that were slowly affecting my life, work, and relationship. I found BodyLogic MD and met Dr. Mazzei.  After a series of test, he prescribed me the T- cream and shortly after 3 weeks of using it, my symptoms disappeared. Dr. Mazzei is a brilliant doctor and truly cares for his patients. I've never felt rushed on every visit. He always takes his time listening to my concerns and is very thorough on explaining things. He is honest and has a good sense of humor. Like I said on every visit: " It's always good to see you, doc!" And I truly meant it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJCSLdt2GlD4gRAAj9rBwiCLI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3OGRfRmZBEAE
reviews.text: Dr Mazzei office is the best.  I was feeling sluggish, rundown and forgetful.  I am now quite the opposite.  I have tons of energy and laser focus.  I have lost 22 lbs and would recommend anyone to visit him.  I wish I would have gone to him sooner!

reviews.name: places/ChIJCSLdt2GlD4gRAAj9rBwiCLI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtaDZUa0t3EAE
reviews.text: My experience with Bodylogic MD has always been wonderful and I have been coming here since 2014...Dr Raskin is the second doctor I seen at Bodylogic in Schaumburg and as always I can rest assured that I am receiving holistic, compassionate care from a doctor who truly listens to you and cares about your unique problems with hormone imbalances...Dr Raskin and his staff have also been very accommodating during the pandemic. Thanks for the great care!

reviews.name: places/ChIJCSLdt2GlD4gRAAj9rBwiCLI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRM0l1Smt3RRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Mazzei has rejuvenated my overall health.  My energy is great, like it was 30 years ago.  My brain fog is gone.  Originally, I was looking for hot flash relief and I'm definitely over them, but also so much more!  Ah, to feel young again...

reviews.name: places/ChIJCSLdt2GlD4gRAAj9rBwiCLI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhbXRXTGFREAE
reviews.text: So happy to find this place and knowledgeable and professional Doctor Raskin, and all his staff super nice and makes you feel comfortable. reviews.text: Dr Nitz and his team at IMA are amazing!  They are extremely knowledgeable, professional, and most importantly caring and compassionate. reviews.text: I had an excellent experience during my visit today. Dr. Seaman was extremely thorough throughout the consultation and took the time to go over every detail of my blood work with me. The entire staff was amazing—friendly, professional, and attentive from start to finish. I left feeling informed, cared for, and confident in the care I received. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJO0YKwHKvD4gRQnc8SorzC0s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5MU5VOXVXVVZvVjJaNVEwMUxaeloxYzBJeWEzYxAB
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of receiving IV hydration services at Thrive MD, and my experience was truly exceptional from start to finish. The staff was welcoming and attentive, making me feel comfortable and cared for throughout my visit. The team was fantastic, checking in on me several times to ensure I was doing well. The facility itself is clean, modern, and calming, and I appreciated having a private room for my therapy. I left feeling refreshed and rejuvenated, and I highly recommend Thrive MD for anyone seeking top-notch IV hydration and wellness services. A special thank you to Bry, Tateauna, Kalina, and the entire team for your outstanding care!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3-QnQ_hXDogRhXxOcb0bghQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1Q2NIRklVRXRtYUhKVFdGazFTMFZpZFZORU4yYxAB
reviews.text:
I’ve been on a long and challenging journey dealing with Lyme disease, mold toxicity, and heavy metal detox. After visiting numerous offices and trying countless protocols over the years, nothing truly clicked—until I found Peak Institute.

The team at Peak is truly exceptional. Their attention to detail is unmatched, and what sets them apart is their ability to look at the full picture rather than just isolated symptoms. They approach healing with a wide-ranging perspective, integrating multiple disciplines and innovative treatments in a way that feels both grounded and deeply personalized.

Every appointment is punctual, and the environment is warm, professional, and genuinely caring. From the moment you walk in, you feel seen, heard, and supported—not just as a patient, but as a whole person.
They work with compounding pharmacies and my prescription is sent immediately.
All their staff members are very caring and I have seen them for a long time. I’m also very glad that I can draw the blood at their clinic. So convenient!

Thanks to Peak Institute, I’m finally experiencing real, sustainable progress in my healing journey. I’m incredibly grateful for their expertise, compassion, and the hope they’ve restored in my life. If you’re looking for a team that truly understands complex, chronic conditions and how to treat them at the root—this is the place.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3-QnQ_hXDogRhXxOcb0bghQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0ek0zRjZibTB5WWpobU16QmlTVmxPY0ZCVFZtYxAB
reviews.text: Dr.Montalvo and her staff are amazing! Her nurse Vanessa is so compassionate in providing patient care. They really address your health needs I absolutely recommend Peak Health Institute for all your health and wellness needs.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3-QnQ_hXDogRhXxOcb0bghQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21STGJWcDFkV0ZLT0VwNGVGSkhMVzV1YkVWdWMzYxAB
reviews.text:
I have been to Peak Health a total of 5 visits beginning in April of 2024 for HRT and saw 3 different providers, all due to staff departures. I just learned that the last one has recently left, which would put me at #4 if I continued.  Clearly, they have high practitioner turnover.  In additional to this, I offer the following as a few main reasons that I do not recommend them:

They have no relationships with any local compounding pharmacies.  This matters if you do not want your prescriptions shipped.  I was referred by one practitioner to a local compounding pharmacy that did not even provide the service pertaining to the script. This is something they clearly should know.

They are a hard sell on pellets, even though I told them repeatedly I was a hard “no” and absolutely NOT interested in them. Still, this came up in EVERY visit and MY reasoning was challenged quite forcefully.

I received mixed messages about available therapies from the same practitioner on multiple occasions.  Usually accompanied by a strong redirect to their ‘preferred’ formulas (compounded vs. FDA approved).

Labs drawn at their facility (contracted with HealthLab) take 2-3 weeks for results to come back.  For self-pay on labs, they will not provide up front pricing.  For a recent hormone only panel, the total charges were $2,296.00, of which the self-pay portion owed was $803.60.  This was substantially different from the prior time I had this same panel and paid only $110.80 out of $2,216.00.  Obviously, these prices are grossly inflated.  In attempt at resolving this discrepancy, I was told that Peak Health has absolutely nothing to do with the lab services billing and that there are no negotiated rates or discounts with the lab, and they deny making any profit from the tests they order. There are better alternatives that will provide up front pricing and have much faster turnaround. Peak Health will however work on steering you - two of the practitioners mentioned that other labs could render inaccurate/skewed results; leading you to believe others are not to be trusted and using “their lab service” is the only way to go.

My impression of Peak Health is they appear to be more concerned about upselling you and using their ‘preferred’ products/services, in order to maximize profits than they are about actual patient results, at least mine.  They have fumbled my care repeatedly, including prescriptions getting called in/refilled, inaccurate clinical history, lack of preparation for appointments, poor bedside manner, conflicting messages, and overall lack of accountability when challenged on issues.  There is far better care available elsewhere.

Without the care and support of their practice, we wouldn't have been able to get the IV therapy our girls needed. reviews.text: I have been a client with Joya and what brought me to her was the way she looks at the body as a whole. I have never felt rushed by her or not validated. This didn’t sit right with me- I talked to Joya and we decided to do a PRP shot. Within a few days my back stopped hurting and I was able to return to normal activities. Joya is also great when it comes to BHRT- she really listens and works with you to make sure you are getting the right dose. My experience thus far has succeeded anything I could have imagined

Joya and her team helped me regain my energy and feel like myself again after struggling with menopause symptoms. They’re incredibly compassionate and take the time to explain lab results in a way that’s easy to understand. I finally feel empowered and informed about what’s going on in my body. Their approach is truly holistic focusing on nutrition, lifestyle changes, and using supplements or medications only when necessary. I’m so grateful for the care and support I’ve received. Highly recommend!
